---
title: "How to Teach the New Testament"
sort_title: "How to Teach the New Testament"
year: 1881
subtitle: "1881"
slug: "how_to_teach_the_New_Testament"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1881*



[Click here to read Charlotte Yonge's*How to teach the New Testament*](http://justus.anglican.org/resources/pc/cmyonge/howtoteach.html)from Project Canterbury
